raw: {id:"dq-esp-001",questionText:"Ki sa ki \"blasfèm kont Lespri Sen an\" dapre Jezi?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Fè peche grav yon sèl fwa"},{id:"b",text:"Rejte atribye travay Lespri Sen a Satan — endirekteman fèmen kè a nèt a grâce Bondye"},{id:"c",text:"Pale kontran ak pastè yo"},{id:"d",text:"Pa ale legliz"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Matye 12:31-32 — Blasfèm kont Lespri a pa ka padone. Kontèks la: Farizyen yo te di Jezi ekspulse demon pa Belzebul. Yo te atribye travay Lespri a Satan — rejte konpletman temwayaj Lespri a.",bibleReference:"Matye 12:31-32"}

{id:"dq-esp-002",questionText:"Ki sa \"plen Lespri Sen\" biblikman vle di?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon eksperyans emosyonèl entans sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Lespri Sen k ap kontwole ak gide tout vi kwayan an — soumisyon kontinu"},{id:"c",text:"Pran lang espesyal sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Yon evènman yon sèl fwa nan sali a"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Efezyen 5:18 — \"Pa sou diven... men plen Lespri Sen.\" Kontèks endike yon etatkonstan soumisyon. Travay 6:3 — \"plen Lespri ak sajès\" = karaktè kontinu.",bibleReference:"Efezyen 5:18"}

{id:"dq-esp-003",questionText:"Ki sa Jezi pwomèt sou Lespri Sen kòm \"Paraklet\" nan Jan 14-16?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lespri k ap ba yo richès"},{id:"b",text:"Konsolate, Avoka, Gid nan verite tout, Anseyan ki sonje pawòl Jezi yo"},{id:"c",text:"Yon espri ki ranplase Jezi fizikman"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman yon prezans emosyonèl"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jan 14:16-17,26; 16:13 — Paraklet (grèk: \"rele bò\") = Konsolate/Avoka. Li abite nan nou, anseye, sonje, gide nan tout verite, temwaye sou Jezi.",bibleReference:"Jan 14:16-17"}

{id:"dq-esc-001",questionText:"Ki sa \"Rapti\" (Ravissement) vle di nan eskatoloji kretyen an?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Rezirèksyon jeneral tout moun mouri yo"},{id:"b",text:"Rankontre Kris nan nwaj — kwayan vivan yo pran ansanm ak resisite yo"},{id:"c",text:"Jijman final tout nasyon yo"},{id:"d",text:"Retou Kris nan tè a pou renye"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Tesalonisyen 4:16-17 — Seyè a desann, resisite mouri nan Kris yo, epi kwayan vivan yo \"pran nan nwaj pou rankontre Seyè a nan lè a.\"",bibleReference:"1 Tesalonisyen 4:16-17"}

{id:"dq-esc-002",questionText:"Ki sa \"Milenyòm\" vle di nan Revelasyon 20?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon peryòd sibolik 1000 ane kounye a"},{id:"b",text:"Reny Kris 1000 ane sou tè a aprè dezyèm retou l"},{id:"c",text:"Yon peryòd soufrans anvan retou Kris"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman 1000 ane literèl dans VT"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Revelasyon 20:1-6 — Satan mare 1000 ane, kwayan ki mouri nan lafwa resisite epi renye avèk Kris. Twa pozisyon: premilenyarism, postmilenyarism, amilenyarism.",bibleReference:"Revelasyon 20:1-6"}

{id:"dq-mis-001",questionText:"Ki kontribisyon fondamantal Antiyòch te bay misyon premye legliz la?",categoryId:"mision",categoryName:"Misyon",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Se premye kote Bib la te ekri"},{id:"b",text:"Premye kote kwayan yo te rele \"kretyen\" ak kote yo voye premye misyonè yo"},{id:"c",text:"Kote Pòl te fonde premye legliz li a"},{id:"d",text:"Kote Konsilta Nikeya a te fèt"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 11:26 — Antiyòch: premye fwa kwayan yo rele \"kretyen.\" Travay 13:1-3 — legliz voye Pòl ak Barnabas nan premye vwayaj misyonè yo. Bèso misyon kretyen an.",bibleReference:"Travay 13:1-3"}

{id:"dq-nt-001",questionText:"Ki sa \"Doktrin Justifikasyon pa Lafwa\" vle di?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Travay bon fè nou jis devan Bondye"},{id:"b",text:"Bondye deklare moun jis pa mwayen lafwa nan Jezi Kris — pa travay"},{id:"c",text:"Lafwa ak travay ansanm nesesè"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman Jwif ka jistifye"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Women 3:28 — \"Nou konkli ke moun ka jistifye pa lafwa, san travay Lwa a.\" Efezyen 2:8-9 — \"Se pa nan travay... pou pèsonn pa ka vante tèt yo.\"",bibleReference:"Women 3:28"}

{id:"dq-tab-001",questionText:"Ki sa ki te andedan Bwat Kontra a?",categoryId:"tabernakulo",categoryName:"Tabènak",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Sèlman de ròch kòmandman yo"},{id:"b",text:"De ròch kòmandman yo, baton Arawon an ak yon bokal laman"},{id:"c",text:"Lò ak lajan"},{id:"d",text:"Liv lalwa Moyiz la sèlman"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Ebre 9:4 — \"...andann li te gen yon bokal an lò ki te plen laman, baton Arawon ki te fleri a, ak de ròch kontra yo.\"",bibleReference:"Ebre 9:4"}

{id:"dq-lid-001",questionText:"Ki non madanm Abraram ki te manman Izarak?",categoryId:"lideres",categoryName:"Lidè Biblik",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Sara"},{id:"b",text:"Rebeka"},{id:"c",text:"Rachèl"},{id:"d",text:"Leya"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"Jenèz 21:1-3 — Sara vin ansent, li fè yon pitit gason pou Abraram nan vye granmoun li... Abraram rele pitit la Izarak.",bibleReference:"Jenèz 21:1-3"}

{id:"dq-viaj-001",questionText:"Nan ki vil Pòl ak Silas te nan prizon lè yon gwo tranblemanntè te rive e pòt yo te louvri?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Efèz"},{id:"b",text:"Filipi"},{id:"c",text:"Tesalonik"},{id:"d",text:"Atèn"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 16:25-26 — \"Bò menwit konsa, Pòl ak Silas t’ap lapriyè... yon sèl gwo tranblemanntè fèt... tout pòt prizon yo louvri.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 16:25-26"}

{id:"dq-viaj-002",questionText:"Ki kote Pòl te ye lè li te wè yon vizyon yon nonm ki t ap di: \"Vin Masedwan, vin ede nou\"?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Twòas"},{id:"b",text:"Antyòch"},{id:"c",text:"Zile Chip"},{id:"d",text:"Lid"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"Travay 16:8-9 — \"Yo travèse peyi Mizi, yo desann lavil Twòas. Nan mitan lannwit, Pòl fè yon vizyon: li wè yon nonm peyi Masedwan...\"",bibleReference:"Travay 16:8-9"}

{id:"dq-viaj-003",questionText:"Ki non premye kretyen nan peyi Ewòp ki te konvèti nan lavil Filipi (yon machann twal violèt)?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Prisil"},{id:"b",text:"Lidi"},{id:"c",text:"Fibe"},{id:"d",text:"Eunice"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 16:14 — \"Youn nan yo te rele Lidi. Se te yon machann bèl twal violèt ki te soti lavil Tiyatir.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 16:14"}

{id:"dq-viaj-004",questionText:"Nan ki vil Pòl te preche sou \"Bondye moun pa konnen an\" nan Areopaj la?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Wòm"},{id:"b",text:"Korent"},{id:"c",text:"Atèn"},{id:"d",text:"Efèz"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Travay 17:22-23 — \"Pòl kanpe nan mitan Areopaj la, li di: Nou menm moun Atèn... m’jwenn yon lotèl kote yo ekri: Pou Bondye nou pa konnen an.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 17:22-23"}

{id:"dq-viaj-005",questionText:"Ki moun ki te mouri tonbe nan fenèt pandan Pòl t ap preche yon diskou byen long nan Twòas?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Etiyis"},{id:"b",text:"Timote"},{id:"c",text:"Tit"},{id:"d",text:"Epafras"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"Travay 20:9 — \"Yon jenn gason yo te rele Etiyis te chita sou rebò fenèt la... somèy pran l... li tonbe sot nan twazyèm etaj la.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 20:9"}

{id:"dq-viaj-006",questionText:"Ki non koup kretyen Pòl te rankontre nan lavil Korent ki te fè tant menm jan avè l?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Ananyas ak Safira"},{id:"b",text:"Akilas ak Prisil"},{id:"c",text:"Filémon ak Apya"},{id:"d",text:"Andwonikis ak Jounyas"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 18:2-3 — \"Lè sa a, li jwenn yon jwif yo te rele Akilas... avèk madanm li Prisil... kòm yo te gen menm metye, Pòl rete lakay yo.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 18:2-3"}

{id:"dq-viaj-007",questionText:"Nan ki vil moun yo te rele Pòl \"Mèki\" ak Banabas \"Jipitè\" apre yon mirak?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lis"},{id:"b",text:"Dèb"},{id:"c",text:"Ikonyòm"},{id:"d",text:"Paphos"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"Travay 14:11-12 — \"Lè pèp la wè sa Pòl te fè a... yo rele Banabas Jipitè, yo rele Pòl Mèki.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 14:11-12"}

{id:"dq-viaj-008",questionText:"Ki kote vwayaj bato Pòl la te fè nofraj sou wout pou l ale Wòm?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Krèt"},{id:"b",text:"Zile Malt"},{id:"c",text:"Zile Chip"},{id:"d",text:"Sizil"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 28:1 — \"Lè nou fin sove, nou vin konnen zile a te rele Malt.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 28:1"}

questionText: Konbyen gwo vwayaj misyonè Pòl te fè (san konte vwayaj li kòm prizonye nan Wòm)?
explanation: Liv Travay la dekri twa gwo vwayaj misyonè Pòl te fè anvan yo te arete l nan Jerizalèm.

raw: {id:"dq-viaj-010",questionText:"Ki jenn gason Pòl te chwazi kòm konpayon vwayaj nan List e ki te gen yon manman jwif ak yon papa grèk?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Tit"},{id:"b",text:"Timote"},{id:"c",text:"Lid"},{id:"d",text:"Silas"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 16:1 — \"Pòl rive lavil Dèb ak lavil List. {id:"dq-viaj-012",questionText:"Ki moun ki te akonpaye Pòl nan premye vwayaj misyonè li a?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Silas"},{id:"b",text:"Banabas"},{id:"c",text:"Lk"},{id:"d",text:"Pyè"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 13:2-4 — \"Lespri Sen an di: Mete Banabas ak Pòl apa pou mwen... yo pati pou Seleusi, apre sa yo pran bato pou zile Chip.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 13:2-4"}

{id:"dq-viaj-013",questionText:"Ki pwofèt ki te mare men l ak pye l ak sentiwon Pòl pou predi sa k pral rive l nan Jerizalèm?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Agabis"},{id:"b",text:"Simeyon"},{id:"c",text:"Filip"},{id:"d",text:"Manao"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"Travay 21:10-11 — \"Yon pwofèt yo rele Agabis desann soti nan peyi Jide... li pran sentiwon Pòl la, li mare men pa l ak pye pa l...\"",bibleReference:"Travay 21:10-11"}

{id:"dq-viaj-014",questionText:"Ki vil ki te sant prensipal dyana (Artemis), kote majisyen yo te boule liv yo apre yo te fin konvèti?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Korent"},{id:"b",text:"Efèz"},{id:"c",text:"Atèn"},{id:"d",text:"Tiyatir"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 19:19, 27 — \"Anpil nan moun ki te konn fè maji pote liv yo, yo boule yo devan tout moun... {id:"dq-viaj-015",questionText:"Ki kote Pòl te pase de lane nan prizon anvan li te mande pou Seza jije li?",categoryId:"viajes-pablo",categoryName:"Vwayaj Pòl",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Wòm"},{id:"b",text:"Sezare"},{id:"c",text:"Jerizalèm"},{id:"d",text:"Damis"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 24:27 — \"De lane pase konsa... Feliks te vle fè jwif yo plezi, li kite Pòl nan prizon.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 24:27"}

{id:"dq-cult-001",questionText:"Ki pye bwa ki se yon senbòl lapè nan Bib la?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Pye pye bwa sèd"},{id:"b",text:"Pye oliv"},{id:"c",text:"Pye fig"},{id:"d",text:"Pye chenn"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Pye oliv la, ak branch li, se yon senbòl lapè depi epòk Noye a lè pijon an te pote yon branch oliv.",bibleReference:"Jenèz 8:11"}

{id:"dq-cult-002",questionText:"Ki sa \"Màn\" nan te ye pou pèp Izrayèl la nan dezè a?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon kalite rad"},{id:"b",text:"Manje ki te soti nan syèl la"},{id:"c",text:"Yon bèt nan dezè a"},{id:"d",text:"Yon dlo anmè"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Egzòd 16:15 — \"Moun Izrayèl yo wè sa, yo yonn di lòt: Sa sa ye sa? {id:"dq-cult-003",questionText:"Ki fwi Izrayèl te pote soti nan peyi Kanaran ki te tèlman gwo li te bezwen de moun pou pote l?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon gwo grenad"},{id:"b",text:"Yon grap rezen"},{id:"c",text:"Yon gwo fig frans"},{id:"d",text:"Yon melon dlo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Resansman 13:23 — \"Yo rive nan Fon Echkòl la, yo koupe yon branch rezen ki te gen yon sèl grap rezen ladan l. De nan mesye yo pote l sou yon bwa...\"",bibleReference:"Resansman 13:23"}

{id:"dq-cult-004",questionText:"Ki bèt ki te senbòl \"Mouton Bondye\" a nan Bib la?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon lyon"},{id:"b",text:"Yon ti mouton"},{id:"c",text:"Yon kabrit"},{id:"d",text:"Yon pijon"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jan 1:29 — \"Jan wè Jezi ki t’ap vin bò kote l, li di: Men ti mouton Bondye a k’ap wete peche moun sou latè.\"",bibleReference:"Jan 1:29"}

{id:"dq-cult-005",questionText:"Nan ki lang Ansyen Testaman an te ekri orijinal?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Grèk"},{id:"b",text:"Ebre"},{id:"c",text:"Laten"},{id:"d",text:"Franse"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Ansyen Testaman an te ekri prèske nèt nan lang Ebre (ak kèk ti pati nan Arameyen).",bibleReference:"Lk 24:44"}

{id:"dq-cult-006",questionText:"Ki fèt jwif kote yo manje pen san ledven?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Pantekovòt"},{id:"b",text:"Pak (Pèsak)"},{id:"c",text:"Fèt Tabènnak yo"},{id:"d",text:"Fèt Limyè a"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Egzòd 12:15 — \"Pandan sèt jou n’a manje pen ki fèt san ledven.\"",bibleReference:"Egzòd 12:15"}

{id:"dq-cult-007",questionText:"Ki ti bèt \"pi piti nan tout grenn\" Jezi te itilize pou l pale de Wayòm syèl la?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Grenn ble"},{id:"b",text:"Grenn moutad"},{id:"c",text:"Grenn pwa"},{id:"d",text:"Grenn rezen"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Matye 13:31-32 — \"Wayòm syèl la tankou yon grenn moutad... li se pi piti nan tout grenn...\"",bibleReference:"Matye 13:31-32"}

{id:"dq-cult-008",questionText:"Ki enstriman mizik David te konn jwe pou wa Sayil?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Twonpèt"},{id:"b",text:"Tenpan (Arp)"},{id:"c",text:"Flit"},{id:"d",text:"Tanbou"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Samyèl 16:23 — \"David pran tenpan li, li jwe... lespri mal la kite Sayil.\"",bibleReference:"1 Samyèl 16:23"}

{id:"dq-cult-009",questionText:"Ki metal ki te senbòl richès ak glwa nan bati Tanp lan?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Fè"},{id:"b",text:"An lò"},{id:"c",text:"An kwiv"},{id:"d",text:"Lajan"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Wa 6 — Salomon te kouvri tout andedan Tanp lan ak bon lò.",bibleReference:"1 Wa 6:22"}

{id:"dq-cult-010",questionText:"Ki kote yo te konn mete lwil pou limen chandelye yo nan epòk biblik la?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Nan bokal vè"},{id:"b",text:"Nan lanp tè (seramik)"},{id:"c",text:"Nan krich an fè"},{id:"d",text:"Nan barik bwa"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Lanp tè (seramik) te mwayen prensipal moun te konn itilize pou limyè nan kay yo.",bibleReference:"Matye 25:4"}

{id:"dq-cult-011",questionText:"Ki kalite rad moun nan epòk biblik la te konn mete pou montre yo nan gwo tristès oswa repantans?",categoryId:"cultura",categoryName:"Bib la ak Kilti",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Rad swa blan"},{id:"b",text:"Twal sak ak sann"},{id:"c",text:"Rad violèt"},{id:"d",text:"Manto lenn"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jonan 3:6 — \"Wa lavil Niniv la... mete yon rad sak sou li, li chita nan sann dife.\"",bibleReference:"Jonas 3:6"}

{id:"dq-esp-004",questionText:"Ki premye demonstrasyon Lespri Sen an nan Travay 2?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon flanbo ki parèt nan syèl la"},{id:"b",text:"Bri tankou van, lang dife, kwayan pale lòt lang"},{id:"c",text:"Yon tranblemann tè"},{id:"d",text:"Apèl vwa Bondye"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 2:1-4 — Pantekovòt: bri tankou van veyolan, lang ki tankou dife, yo tout plen Lespri Sen ak kòmanse pale lòt lang. Akompliseman pwomès Jezi (Travay 1:8).",bibleReference:"Travay 2:1-4"}

{id:"dq-esp-005",questionText:"Ki wòl santral Lespri Sen an genyen nan konvèsyon?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Li padone peche yo dirèkteman"},{id:"b",text:"Li konvenk kè a sou peche, jistis ak jijman — epi fè nòv nesans"},{id:"c",text:"Li ba moun yo lang espesyal sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Li se sèlman yon enfliyans moral"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jan 16:8 — \"Lè li vini li pral konvenk mond lan de peche, jistis ak jijman.\" Jan 3:5-6 — \"Si yon moun pa fèt nan dlo ak Lespri, li pa ka antre nan wayòm Bondye.\"",bibleReference:"Jan 16:8"}

{id:"dq-esp-006",questionText:"Ki sa Lespri Sen fè nan kwayan an dapre Women 8?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Sèlman ba yo don lang yo"},{id:"b",text:"Abite nan yo, resisite kò mòtèl yo, priye pou yo, temwaye avèk lespri yo ke yo pitit Bondye"},{id:"c",text:"Fèmen yo nan yon sèl legliz"},{id:"d",text:"Delivre yo de tout soufrans fizik"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Women 8:9-16,26-27 — Lespri: abite, resisite, adopte kòm pitit, temwaye avèk lespri nou, entèsede avèk grèman ki pa eksprime.",bibleReference:"Women 8:15-16"}

{id:"dq-esp-007",questionText:"Ki sa \"don lang\" (glossolalie) reprezante nan 1 Korentyen 12-14?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Siy prensipal tout kwayan dwe genyen"},{id:"b",text:"Yon don espirityèl pou priyè ak adorasyon — ki bezwen entèpretasyon nan legliz pou bati lòt yo"},{id:"c",text:"Sèlman lang imen etranje ke nou aprann senaturèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Don ki pa valid ankò jodi a"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Korentyen 14:2-5 — Lang edifye moun k ap pale li. Nan legliz, li bezwen entèpretasyon pou lòt yo ka bati (v.5). Pa tout moun pale lang (1 Kor 12:30).",bibleReference:"1 Korentyen 14:5"}

{id:"dq-esp-008",questionText:"Ki sa \"pwofesi\" kòm don espirityèl vle di?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Predi lavni sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Pale pou konsolasyon, egzòtasyon ak edifikasyon — pawòl ki soti nan Bondye"},{id:"c",text:"Egalite avèk Ekriti a"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman kòm don grann pwofèt AT yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Korentyen 14:3 — \"Men moun ki pwofetize pale bay moun pou edifikasyon, egzòtasyon ak konsolasyon.\" Pwofesi NT ka gen eleman prediksyon men objetif prensipal li se bati.",bibleReference:"1 Korentyen 14:3"}

{id:"dq-esp-009",questionText:"Ki sa \"tès espri yo\" vle di dapre 1 Jan 4?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Teste pwofèt yo pa kote yo soti"},{id:"b",text:"Evalye si yon ansèyman soti nan Bondye — tès: konfese Jezi vini nan chè"},{id:"c",text:"Obsève mirak kòm prèv"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman tès ki reze pou ansyen yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Jan 4:1-3 — \"Teste espri yo.\" Tès: espri ki konfese Jezi Kris ki vini nan chè = Lespri Bondye. Espri ki refize konfese sa = espri Antichristo. Tès doktrin Enkannasyon.",bibleReference:"1 Jan 4:1-3"}

{id:"dq-esp-010",questionText:"Konbyen fwa Lespri Sen te desann vizibleman nan Travay?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon sèl fwa nan Pantekovòt"},{id:"b",text:"Plizyè fwa: Jerizalèm (ch.2), Samari (ch.8), Kay Kònetiy (ch.10), Efèz (ch.19)"},{id:"c",text:"Twa fwa sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Chak fwa yon moun te batize"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay montre plizyè \"Pantekovòt\": Jwif (2), Samaritèn (8), Jantil (10), disip Jan (19). Èlman teolojik: ekspansyon prog Evanjil la atravè diferan gwoup.",bibleReference:"Travay 10:44-46"}

{id:"dq-esp-011",questionText:"Ki sa \"don gerizon\" reprezante bibliyèlman?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Kapasite tounen doktè medikal"},{id:"b",text:"Don bay pa Lespri pou resisite moun malad sinnaturèlman, pou temwaye pouvwa Bondye"},{id:"c",text:"Pran medikaman kòm priyè"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman pou apòt yo nan 1ye syèk la"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Korentyen 12:9,28 — Don gerizon nan lis don Lespri yo. NT montre Jezi, apòt, epi lòt kwayan geri (Jak 5:14-15). Bondye ka geri atravè priyè ak don espirityèl.",bibleReference:"1 Korentyen 12:9"}

{id:"dq-esp-012",questionText:"Ki diferans ant \"Lespri Sen\" kòm pèsòn ak yon \"senp fòs\"?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Pa gen diferans — yo se menm bagay"},{id:"b",text:"Bib la deskriye Lespri Sen kòm yon pèsòn: li anseye, priye, temwaye, ka atris, gen volonte — pa yon senp enfliyans"},{id:"c",text:"Lespri Sen se sèlman yon fòs moral"},{id:"d",text:"Lespri Sen se yon zanj espesyal"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jan 14:26; Women 8:26-27; Efezyen 4:30 — Lespri Sen anseye (pèsonalite), priye (pèsonalite), ka \"atris\" (pèsonalite). Li gen volonte (1 Kor 12:11). Twazyèm pèsòn Trinite a.",bibleReference:"Efezyen 4:30"}

{id:"dq-esp-013",questionText:"Ki sa \"sele pa Lespri Sen\" vle di nan Efezyen 1?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon mak fizik sou kò kwayan an"},{id:"b",text:"Garansyon divèn sou sali kwayan an — Lespri Sen kòm depozit ki pwomèt eritaj konplè a"},{id:"c",text:"Yon sèman piblik pou reste fidèl"},{id:"d",text:"Batèm pa dlo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Efezyen 1:13-14 — \"Nou te sele nan Lespri Sen pwomès la... ki se garansyon eritaj nou an.\" Sele = mak pwopriyete Bondye + pwoteksyon. Lespri kòm arès sou sali a.",bibleReference:"Efezyen 1:13-14"}

{id:"dq-esp-014",questionText:"Ki sa Bib la anseye sou \"etenn Lespri\" (1 Tes 5:19)?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Pèdi Lespri Sen nèt"},{id:"b",text:"Sofoke ak reziste travay ak mouvman Lespri Sen an pa peche ak dezobeyisans"},{id:"c",text:"Pale kont legliz la"},{id:"d",text:"Pa ale adorasyon pandan plis de semèn"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Tesalonisyen 5:19-20 — \"Pa etenn Lespri Sen an, pa meprize pwofesi.\" Etenn = reziste, bloke inisyativ Lespri a pa peche volontèm, dezobeyisans oswa mank de soumisyon.",bibleReference:"1 Tesalonisyen 5:19"}

{id:"dq-esp-015",questionText:"Ki sa pwomès Jezi sou Lespri Sen vle di pou misyon legliz la jounen jodi a?",categoryId:"espiritu-santo",categoryName:"Lespri Sen",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Sèlman pou premye disip yo — pwomès la fini"},{id:"b",text:"Lespri Sen rete avèk legliz la pou tout tan pou pouvwa misyon, ansèyman ak temwayaj"},{id:"c",text:"Lespri Sen kounye a pa bay don piblik yo"},{id:"d",text:"Legliz bezwen yon nouvo Pantekovòt chak jenerasyon"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 1:8 — \"Nou pral resevwa pouvwa lè Lespri Sen vini sou nou, epi nou pral temwen mwen... jis bout tè a.\" Pwomès la pou tout jenerasyon kwayan (Travay 2:39).",bibleReference:"Travay 1:8"}

{id:"dq-esc-003",questionText:"Ki siy Jezi bay ki endike retou li a ap pwoche (Matye 24)?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lapè mond lan ak bon nouvèl sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Gè, grangou, tranblemann tè, pèsekisyon, fo kris, refwadisman amou, Evanjil prèche nan tout mond lan"},{id:"c",text:"Yon gwo révèy espirityèl mondial"},{id:"d",text:"Disparisyon tout kriminalite"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Matye 24:6-14 — Jezi site: gè, grangou, tranblemann tè (doulè akouchman), pèsekisyon, fo pwofèt, refwadisman amou, Evanjil prèche — epi lafen an vini.",bibleReference:"Matye 24:6-14"}

{id:"dq-esc-004",questionText:"Ki sa \"Gwo Tribikasyon\" vle di dapre Revelasyon?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Soufrans legliz nan tout istwa"},{id:"b",text:"Yon peryòd final soufrans entans anvan retou Kris — kèk wè 7 ane, kèk wè soufrans legliz la an jeneral"},{id:"c",text:"Gè 1e Mond la ak 2e Mond la"},{id:"d",text:"Pèsekisyon Neron sèlman"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Revelasyon 7:14; Matye 24:21 — \"Gwo Tribikasyon\" = soufrans ki pa janm te wè anvan. {id:"dq-esc-005",questionText:"Ki sa \"Nouvèl Jerizalèm\" nan Revelasyon 21 reprezante?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Vil Jerizalèm modèn agrandi"},{id:"b",text:"Eta final pèp Bondye — kominyon konplè Bondye ak moun, bèl ak pafè"},{id:"c",text:"Yon rèv apwopatik sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Tanp Salomon ki rebati"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Revelasyon 21:1-4 — \"Bondye pral rete avèk yo... pa pral gen dèy, kriye ni doulè ankò.\" Nouvèl Jerizalèm = tabènak Bondye nan mitan moun, resti relasyon Edenn ak plis.",bibleReference:"Revelasyon 21:1-4"}

{id:"dq-esc-006",questionText:"Ki sa \"jijman tron blan\" (Revelasyon 20:11) reprezante?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Jijman kwayan yo sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Jijman final tout moun mouri yo dapre travay yo — ki nan liv yo"},{id:"c",text:"Jijman Satan ak demon yo"},{id:"d",text:"Jijman nasyon yo pandan Milenyòm nan"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Revelasyon 20:11-15 — Tron blan: tout mouri resisite, jije dapre travay yo. Moun ki pa nan \"Liv Lavi Mouton an\" — lak dife a. Jijman final ak definitif.",bibleReference:"Revelasyon 20:11-15"}

{id:"dq-esc-007",questionText:"Ki sa \"kò rezirèksyon\" pral tankou dapre Pòl?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Menm kò fizik ak tout defèt li yo"},{id:"b",text:"Yon kò espirityèl — pisan, glorye, enkoripsib — tankou kò gloriye Kris la"},{id:"c",text:"Nou pral egziste kòm espri ki pa gen kò"},{id:"d",text:"Chak moun pral gen yon fòm diferan"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Korentyen 15:42-44 — \"Semans nan kòripsyon, resisite nan inkòripsyon; semans nan opwòb, resisite nan glwa; semans nan feblès, resisite nan pouvwa; kò natirèl, resisite espirityèl.\"",bibleReference:"1 Korentyen 15:42-44"}

{id:"dq-esc-008",questionText:"Ki sa espwa kretyen an sou lanmò genyen?",categoryId:"escatologia",categoryName:"Eskatoloji",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lanmò se lafen tout bagay"},{id:"b",text:"Rezirèksyon kò pou etènite — Kris premye fwi rezirèksyon an"},{id:"c",text:"Âme yo rete kòm fantom"},{id:"d",text:"Reyenkarnasyon"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Korentyen 15:20-22 — \"Kris resisite kòm premye fwi moun ki mouri yo.\" Rezirèksyon Kris = garantid rezirèksyon kwayan yo. {id:"dq-mis-002",questionText:"Ki sa \"misyon Dei\" (Misyon Bondye) vle di?",categoryId:"mision",categoryName:"Misyon",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Misyon legliz sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Bondye li menm se misyonè prensipal — legliz patisipe nan misyon Bondye a"},{id:"c",text:"Voye moun etranje sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Travay espesyalman pou ONG kretyen"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Teoloji kontenporèn: \"Misyon Dei\" — misyon pati nan Bondye Trinite a. {id:"dq-mis-003",questionText:"Ki premye misyonè ki mansyone nan liv Travay yo?",categoryId:"mision",categoryName:"Misyon",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Pòl ak Barnabas"},{id:"b",text:"Filip ak Pyè"},{id:"c",text:"Etyen ak Jan"},{id:"d",text:"Niklas ak Timon"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Travay 8 — Filip pote Evanjil Samari epi evanjelize yon etyopyen. Pyè te ale Kapadòs ak Lis. Premye misyon deyò Jerizalèm anvan Pòl.",bibleReference:"Travay 8:4-8"}

{id:"dq-mis-004",questionText:"Ki diferans ant \"evangjelizasyon\" ak \"misyon entegral\"?",categoryId:"mision",categoryName:"Misyon",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yo menm — sèlman pawòl diferan"},{id:"b",text:"Evanjilizasyon = pwoklamasyon verbal; misyon entegral = adrese tout bezwen imen (espirityèl, sosyal, fizik)"},{id:"c",text:"Misyon entegral pa gen espirityèl"},{id:"d",text:"Evanjilizasyon pi enpòtan ke sosyal"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Lk 4:18-19 — Jezi te preche ak geri, delivre ak libere. Misyon entegral: kò, lespri, sosyete. Lozàn Konvenant (1974) note tou de dimansyon yo enpòtan.",bibleReference:"Lk 4:18-19"}

{id:"dq-mis-005",questionText:"Ki sa \"10/40 Finèt\" vle di nan diskisyon misyon?",categoryId:"mision",categoryName:"Misyon",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Dat yon konferans misyonè"},{id:"b",text:"Zòn jeyografik 10-40° Nò kote pifò moun ki pa jwenn Evanjil la rete"},{id:"c",text:"Yon pwogram pou Afrik sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Kantite ak kalite misyonè yo bezwen"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Konsèp Luis Bush (1990) — Finèt 10/40: zòn ant latitid 10 ak 40 Nò (Afrik Nò, Mwayen Oryan, Azi) kote majorite pèp \"enkonsidere\" yo ak pi gwo rezistans pou Evanjil.",bibleReference:"Matye 28:19"}

{id:"dq-ora-001",questionText:"Ki eleman prensipal ki nan Priyè Seyè a?",categoryId:"oracion",categoryName:"Priyè",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Sèlman demand pèsonèl"},{id:"b",text:"Adoresyon, volonte Bondye, bezwen chak jou, padon, delivrans"},{id:"c",text:"Lwanj espirityèl sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Konfesyon ak penitans"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Matye 6:9-13 — Priyè Seyè a: adoresyon (\"Papa nou...\"), wayòm Bondye, bezwen kotidyen (\"pen nou chak jou\"), padon (resevwa ak bay), delivrans mal.",bibleReference:"Matye 6:9-13"}

{id:"dq-ora-002",questionText:"Ki sa Bib la anseye sou priyè \"san sispann\" (1 Tes 5:17)?",categoryId:"oracion",categoryName:"Priyè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Priye 24 èdtan san janm kanpe"},{id:"b",text:"Yon atitid kontinu kominikasyon ak Bondye nan tout aktivite yo"},{id:"c",text:"Resitatif priyè ki repete plizyè fwa pa jou"},{id:"d",text:"Jèn pandan priyè a"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Tesalonisyen 5:17 — \"Priye san sispann.\" Kontèks la: pa yon priyè literal nonstop men yon atitid kè ki rele sou Bondye nan tout sikonstans (Efezyen 6:18).",bibleReference:"1 Tesalonisyen 5:17"}

{id:"dq-ora-003",questionText:"Ki sa Jezi anseye sou pèsistans nan priyè (Lk 18)?",categoryId:"oracion",categoryName:"Priyè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Priye yon sèl fwa sèlman pou montre konfyans"},{id:"b",text:"Pèsiste nan priyè kòm jij enjis la — Bondye reponn fidèl li yo ki priye san pèdi kouraj"},{id:"c",text:"Anpil priyè garanti repons imedyat"},{id:"d",text:"Priyè an gwoup sèlman efikas"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Lk 18:1-8 — Parabòl vèv ki pèsiste ak jij enjis la. Jezi ensiste: \"Pa janm pèdi kouraj nan priyè.\" Si jij enjis reponn, Bondye pral reponn fidèl li yo plis vit.",bibleReference:"Lk 18:1-8"}

{id:"dq-ora-004",questionText:"Ki sa entèsesyon genyen kòm karakteristik espesyal?",categoryId:"oracion",categoryName:"Priyè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Priyè pèsonèl sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Priyè pou lòt moun — kanpe kòm meditatè devan Bondye pou bezwen lòt yo"},{id:"c",text:"Priyè ak jèn obligatwa"},{id:"d",text:"Priyè piblik nan legliz"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Timote 2:1 — \"Mwen egzòte anvan tout bagay ke yo fè siplikasyon, priyè, entèsesyon, ak aksyon de gras pou tout moun.\" Abraram (Jen 18), Moyiz (Egz 32), Jezi (Jan 17) kòm modèl entèsesè.",bibleReference:"1 Timote 2:1"}

{id:"dq-ora-005",questionText:"Ki sa Jakòb anseye sou priyè lafwa pou malad yo?",categoryId:"oracion",categoryName:"Priyè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Malad yo dwe priye pou tèt yo sèlman"},{id:"b",text:"Ansyen legliz la dwe priye sou malad yo ak lwil — priyè lafwa pral sove malad la"},{id:"c",text:"Priyè pou malad yo pa nesesè si yo gen bon doktè"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman pastè yo ka priye pou malad"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jak 5:14-15 — \"Si yon moun malad pami nou, li rele ansyen legliz yo... priye sou li ak lwil... priyè lafwa pral delivre moun malad la.\" Sèvis kolèktif pou gerizon.",bibleReference:"Jak 5:14-15"}

{id:"dq-nt-002",questionText:"Konbyen liv NT genyen?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"24"},{id:"b",text:"27"},{id:"c",text:"39"},{id:"d",text:"66"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"NT gen 27 liv: 4 Evanjil, Travay, 21 lèt, Revelasyon.",bibleReference:"Revelasyon 22:18"}

{id:"dq-nt-003",questionText:"Ki moun ki te ekri plis liv NT?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Pyè"},{id:"b",text:"Jan"},{id:"c",text:"Pòl"},{id:"d",text:"Lk"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Pòl te ekri 13 (oswa 14 si Ebre) liv NT: Women, Korentyen, Galat, Efezyen, Filipyen, Kolosyen, Tesalonisyen, Timote, Tit, Filemòn.",bibleReference:"Women 1:1"}

{id:"dq-nt-004",questionText:"Ki premye Evanjil ki ekri yo dapre majorite espè yo?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Jan"},{id:"b",text:"Matye"},{id:"c",text:"Mak"},{id:"d",text:"Lk"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Majorite espè konsidere Mak kòm premye Evanjil ekri (50-65 AD), epi Matye ak Lk te itilize li kòm sous (Teyori de-sous).",bibleReference:"Mak 1:1"}

{id:"dq-nt-005",questionText:"Ki sa \"Sinoptik\" vle di nan etid Evanjil yo?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Evanjil ki gen plis mirak"},{id:"b",text:"Matye, Mak ak Lk ki pataje anpil materyèl paralèl"},{id:"c",text:"Evanjil ki pi ansyen yo"},{id:"d",text:"Sèlman Evanjil Mak la"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Sinoptik (grèk: \"wè ansanm\") = Matye, Mak, Lk. {id:"dq-nt-006",questionText:"Ki liv NT ki ekri anvan lèt Pòl yo?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Matye"},{id:"b",text:"Jan"},{id:"c",text:"Jak"},{id:"d",text:"Ebre"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Majorite espè date Jak nan ~45-50 AD — anvan lèt Pòl yo (pi bonè ~48 AD pou Galat). Jak ka youn nan premye ekrit NT.",bibleReference:"Jak 1:1"}

{id:"dq-nt-007",questionText:"Ki sa \"Pwoblèm Sinoptik\" etidyan NT yo analize?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Diferans ant Jwif ak Jantil nan NT"},{id:"b",text:"Kijan Matye, Mak ak Lk gen anpil materyèl komen — ki sous yo te pataje?"},{id:"c",text:"Erè nan tradiksyon NT"},{id:"d",text:"Kont enpòtans diferan apòt yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Pwoblèm Sinoptik: poukisa Matye, Mak, Lk resanble anpil? Teyori prensipal: Pryorite Mak (Mak ekri anvan, Matye/Lk itilize li + yon sous \"Q\").",bibleReference:"Lk 1:1-4"}

{id:"dq-nt-008",questionText:"Ki sa \"Repa Seyè a\" reprezante?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon senp diné kretyen"},{id:"b",text:"Selebrasyon kò ak san Kris, pwoklamasyon lanmò li jiska retou l"},{id:"c",text:"Sèlman pou pastè yo"},{id:"d",text:"Ranplasman sakrifis AT yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Korentyen 11:23-26 — \"Chak fwa nou manje pen sa a ak bwè tas la, nou pwoklamasyon lanmò Seyè a jiskaske li vini.\"",bibleReference:"1 Korentyen 11:26"}

{id:"dq-nt-009",questionText:"Ki sa \"Lèt Pastoral\" yo vle di?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lèt pou pèp jeneral la"},{id:"b",text:"1 Timote, 2 Timote, Tit — lèt Pòl bay lidè legliz pou pran swen kongregasyon"},{id:"c",text:"Sèlman Ebre"},{id:"d",text:"Lèt Pyè yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Timote, 2 Timote ak Tit rele \"Pastoral\" paske yo adrese dirije legliz (pastè) ak enstriksyon pou lidèship espirityèl, karaktè ak ansèyman sèn.",bibleReference:"1 Timote 3:1-7"}

{id:"dq-nt-010",questionText:"Ki sa \"Lèt Jeneral\" yo nan NT?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lèt pou yon sèl legliz"},{id:"b",text:"Jak, Pyè, Jan, Jid — lèt adrese a plizyè legliz oswa a legliz jeneral la"},{id:"c",text:"Sèlman lèt Pòl yo"},{id:"d",text:"Ebre ak Revelasyon"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Lèt Jeneral (Katolik): Jak, 1-2 Pyè, 1-2-3 Jan, Jid. Pa adrese a yon legliz espesifik men a kominote kretyen pi laj la.",bibleReference:"Jak 1:1"}

{id:"dq-nt-011",questionText:"Ki mesaj santral Evanjil Jan an?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Jezi kòm Wa Izrayèl"},{id:"b",text:"Jezi kòm Pitit Bondye étenèl — kwè pou jwenn lavi étenèl"},{id:"c",text:"Jezi kòm pwofèt sèlman"},{id:"d",text:"Istwa Legliz premye a"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jan 20:31 — \"Bagay sa yo ekri pou nou ka kwè ke Jezi se Kris la, Pitit Bondye, epi pa lafwa nou pral gen lavi nan non l.\"",bibleReference:"Jan 20:31"}

{id:"dq-nt-012",questionText:"Ki sa \"Pitit Bondye\" vle di nan kontèks NT?",categoryId:"nuevo-testamento",categoryName:"Nouvo Testaman",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Yon pitit adopsyon Bondye kreye"},{id:"b",text:"Pèsòn dezyèm Trinite a — ko-égal ak ko-étenèl ak Bondye — vrai Bondye ak vrai moun"},{id:"c",text:"Yon tit onoraryik bay gwo lidè"},{id:"d",text:"Yon zanj espesyal Bondye kreye"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jan 1:1,18; 10:30 — \"Pawòl la te Bondye,\" \"Mwen ak Papa a nou se youn.\" Konsilta Nikaya (325 AD) konfime: Jezi homoousios (menm sibstans) ak Bondye.",bibleReference:"Jan 10:30"}

{id:"dq-lid-011",questionText:"Ki moun Bondye te pale avè l nan yon touf bwa ki t ap boule men ki pa t ap boule nèt?",categoryId:"lideres",categoryName:"Lidè Biblik",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Abraram"},{id:"b",text:"Jakòb"},{id:"c",text:"Moyiz"},{id:"d",text:"Izarak"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Egzòd 3:2-4 — Zanj Seyè a parèt devan Moyiz nan yon flanm dife nan mitan yon touf bwa.",bibleReference:"Egzòd 3:2-4"}

{id:"dq-lid-012",questionText:"Ki pitit gason Jakòb ki te vin gouvènè nan peyi Ejip?",categoryId:"lideres",categoryName:"Lidè Biblik",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Ribenn"},{id:"b",text:"Benjamen"},{id:"c",text:"Jozèf"},{id:"d",text:"Jida"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Jenèz 41:41 — Farawon an di Jozèf: \"Gade, m’ap mete ou chèf sou tout peyi Ejip la.\"",bibleReference:"Jenèz 41:41"}

{id:"dq-lid-013",questionText:"Ki non manman Samyèl ki te fè yon ve pou li bay Bondye jenn gason sa a?",categoryId:"lideres",categoryName:"Lidè Biblik",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Penina"},{id:"b",text:"An"},{id:"c",text:"Mari"},{id:"d",text:"Eli"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"1 Samyèl 1 — An te fè yon ve... apre li fin sevre Samyèl, li mennen l nan tanp lan pou l sèvi Bondye tout lavi l.",bibleReference:"1 Samyèl 1:11, 28"}

{id:"dq-lid-014",questionText:"Ki moun ki te marenn Moyiz nan larivyè Nil la e ki te rele l Moyiz?",categoryId:"lideres",categoryName:"Lidè Biblik",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Madanm farawon an"},{id:"b",text:"Pitit fi farawon an"},{id:"c",text:"Miryam"},{id:"d",text:"Yokebèd"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Egzòd 2:10 — Pitit fi farawon an pran timoun nan pou pitit li, li rele l Moyiz.",bibleReference:"Egzòd 2:10"}

{id:"dq-lid-015",questionText:"Ki wa ki te mande Bondye sajès pou l te ka gouvènen pèp li a byen?",categoryId:"lideres",categoryName:"Lidè Biblik",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"David"},{id:"b",text:"Sayil"},{id:"c",text:"Salomon"},{id:"d",text:"Jozyas"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"1 Wa 3:9 — Salomon mande: \"Tanpri, ban mwen konesans pou m ka gouvènen pèp ou a.\"",bibleReference:"1 Wa 3:9"}

{id:"dq-inte-001",questionText:"Konbyen tan pèp la te pase san yo pa t resevwa pwofesi ant liv Malachi ak nesans Jezi?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"100 ane"},{id:"b",text:"400 ane"},{id:"c",text:"1000 ane"},{id:"d",text:"70 ane"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Yo rele peryòd sa a \"Peryòd Silans lan\", li te dire anviwon 400 ane.",bibleReference:"Malachi 4:5-6"}

{id:"dq-inte-002",questionText:"Ki lang ki te vin tounen lang entènasyonal nan peryòd ant testaman yo akòz konkèt Aleksann Legran?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Laten"},{id:"b",text:"Ebre"},{id:"c",text:"Grèk"},{id:"d",text:"Arameyen"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Konkèt Aleksann Legran te gaye kilti ak lang Grèk la (Elenis), sa ki te ede nan gaye Nouvo Testaman an pita.",bibleReference:"Jan 19:20"}

{id:"dq-inte-003",questionText:"Ki fanmi Jwif ki te mennen yon revòlt kont Seleyisid yo pou re-konsakre Tanp lan (sa yo fete nan Hanouka)?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Ewodyen yo"},{id:"b",text:"Makabe yo"},{id:"c",text:"Zelòt yo"},{id:"d",text:"Sadiseyen yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Revòlt Makabe yo te kòmanse an 167 anvan Jezikri kont Antiochus IV Epiphanes.",bibleReference:"Jan 10:22"}

{id:"dq-inte-004",questionText:"Ki non tradiksyon Ansyen Testaman an an Grèk ki te fèt nan peryòd sa a?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Vilat"},{id:"b",text:"Septante (LXX)"},{id:"c",text:"Peshitta"},{id:"d",text:"Vulgat"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Septante la (LXX) te tradiksyon grèk Ansyen Testaman an, disip Jezi yo te itilize li anpil.",bibleReference:"Lk 4:18"}

{id:"dq-inte-005",questionText:"Ki gwoup relijye nan epòk Jezi a ki pa t kwè nan rezirèksyon?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Farizyen yo"},{id:"b",text:"Esenyen yo"},{id:"c",text:"Sadiseyen yo"},{id:"d",text:"Zelòt yo"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Travay 23:8 — \"Sadiseyen yo di pa gen rezirèksyon... men Farizyen yo kwè nan tou de.\"",bibleReference:"Travay 23:8"}

{id:"dq-inte-006",questionText:"Ki wa ki te okipe Jide pandan nesans Jezi e ki te re-bati Tanp lan?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Seza Ogis"},{id:"b",text:"Ewòd Legran"},{id:"c",text:"Pons Pilat"},{id:"d",text:"Tiberiyis"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Matye 2:1 — \"Jezi te fèt Betleyèm... nan epòk wa Ewòd.\"",bibleReference:"Matye 2:1"}

{id:"dq-inte-007",questionText:"Kijan yo rele liv ki te ekri nan peryòd sa a men ki pa nan kanon Jwif la oswa Pwotestan an?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Lwa yo"},{id:"b",text:"Apokrif oswa Deutewokanonisèl"},{id:"c",text:"Pwofèt yo"},{id:"d",text:"Evanjil yo"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Liv sa yo tankou Makabe, Tobit, ak Jidit te ekri pandan peryòd ant testaman yo.",bibleReference:"Jan 10:22"}

{id:"dq-inte-008",questionText:"Ki lang pifò Jwif te pale nan lavi chak jou nan epòk Jezi a?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Ebre"},{id:"b",text:"Laten"},{id:"c",text:"Arameyen"},{id:"d",text:"Grèk"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Malgre grèk te lang entènasyonal la, arameyen te lang pèp Jwif la te pale lakay yo.",bibleReference:"Mak 5:41"}

{id:"dq-inte-009",questionText:"Ki gwoup Jwif ki te rete nan dezè e ki ta ka ekri woulo Lanmè Mòt yo?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Esenyen yo"},{id:"b",text:"Sadiseyen yo"},{id:"c",text:"Zelòt yo"},{id:"d",text:"Ewodyen yo"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"Esenyen yo te yon gwoup ki te viv nan dezè Qumran nan yon lavi apa pou Bondye.",bibleReference:"Matye 3:1"}

{id:"dq-inte-010",questionText:"Ki imperi ki te kontwole Izrayèl jis anvan imperi Women an?",categoryId:"intertestamentario",categoryName:"Peryòd Ant-Testamantè",difficulty:"hard",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Babilòn"},{id:"b",text:"Grès"},{id:"c",text:"Pès"},{id:"d",text:"Ejip"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Apre konkèt Aleksann Legran yo, Izrayèl te anba kontwòl Grèk yo (Ptolemée ak Seleyisid).",bibleReference:"Daniel 8:21"}

{id:"dq-guer-001",questionText:"Ki lavil miray li te tonbe apre Izrayèl te fè wonn li pandan sèt jou?",categoryId:"guerras",categoryName:"Gè ak Konkèt",difficulty:"easy",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Ayi"},{id:"b",text:"Jeriko"},{id:"c",text:"Gabaon"},{id:"d",text:"Jerizalèm"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jozye 6:20 — Pèp la rele fò, prèt yo kònen kòn yo... miray lavil la tonbe plat atè.",bibleReference:"Jozye 6:20"}

{id:"dq-guer-002",questionText:"Konbyen sòlda Gedeon te genyen nan fen an pou l goumen kont Madyanit yo?",categoryId:"guerras",categoryName:"Gè ak Konkèt",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"32,000"},{id:"b",text:"10,000"},{id:"c",text:"300"},{id:"d",text:"1,000"}],correctOptionId:"c",explanation:"Jij 7:7 — Bondye di Gedeon: \"Se avèk twasan gason sa yo m’ap sove nou.\"",bibleReference:"Jij 7:7"}

{id:"dq-guer-003",questionText:"Ki zam Gedeon ak sòlda li yo te itilize pou fè lènmi yo panike?",categoryId:"guerras",categoryName:"Gè ak Konkèt",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Epe ak plak pwotèj"},{id:"b",text:"Kòn belye, krich ak flanbo"},{id:"c",text:"Arc ak flèch"},{id:"d",text:"Charyo fè"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jij 7:16 — Li bay chak moun yon kòn, yon krich vid ak yon flanbo andedan krich la.",bibleReference:"Jij 7:16"}

{id:"dq-guer-004",questionText:"Ki wa ki te pèdi lavi li nan batay sou Mòn Gilboa kont Filisti yo?",categoryId:"guerras",categoryName:"Gè ak Konkèt",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Sayil"},{id:"b",text:"David"},{id:"c",text:"Salomon"},{id:"d",text:"Jozyas"}],correctOptionId:"a",explanation:"1 Samyèl 31:1-6 — Filisti yo goumen kont Izrayèl... Sayil ak twa pitit gason li mouri menm jou a.",bibleReference:"1 Samyèl 31:6"}

{id:"dq-guer-005",questionText:"Ki moun ki te mennen lame Izrayèl la pou pran lavil Ayi apre yo te fin echwe premye fwa a?",categoryId:"guerras",categoryName:"Gè ak Konkèt",difficulty:"medium",language:"ht",options:[{id:"a",text:"Moyiz"},{id:"b",text:"Jozye"},{id:"c",text:"Kalèb"},{id:"d",text:"Akàn"}],correctOptionId:"b",explanation:"Jozye 8:1 — Bondye di Jozye: \"Pran tout lame a avèk ou, moute al atake Ayi.\"",bibleReference:"Jozye 8:1"}
